idea-plugin.name: Hoverfly
idea-plugin.description:
Language support for Hoverfly simulation files.

Adds diagnostics, completions, hover documentation, and semantic highlighting for Hoverfly JSON simulation files (*.hoverfly.json, *.hfy, hoverfly-simulation.json) in any JetBrains IDE, including the free Community edition.

The Hoverfly language server is bundled with this plugin and started automatically — no manual LSP configuration is required. A Node.js runtime (20+) must be available; it is auto-detected from common locations, or set the HOVERFLY_LSP_NODE environment variable to point at a specific node binary.

Powered by the @jterrazz/hoverfly-lsp language server and LSP4IJ (auto-installed).

  • Diagnostics for invalid simulation structure and fields
  • Completion for matchers, fields, and known enums
  • Hover documentation
  • Semantic-token highlighting (including Handlebars templates)
idea-plugin.change-notes: 0.1.0 — First release: diagnostics, completion, hover, and semantic highlighting for Hoverfly simulation files.
